data.title: Consistency and Standards
data.description: Maintains a consistent design language across all Google services.

data.title: Visibility of System Status
data.description: Ensures that users are informed of system status to enhance trust and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Loading indicators, error messages, real-time updates

data.title: User Control and Freedom
data.description: Empowers users to easily navigate and control their interactions with Google services.
data.technical_spec: UNDO options, settings customization, clear navigation

data.title: Recognizing Needs and Preferences
data.description: Identifies user needs through behavioral data analysis to personalize experiences.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning, user consent-driven preferences, adaptive algorithms

data.title: Error Prevention
data.description: Designs interfaces to prevent errors before they occur.
data.technical_spec: Form validations, contextual hints, confirmation dialogs
